task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus web interface dashboard is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the group membership changes reports or events to investigate the escalations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus interface shows a report or search results for 'Group Membership Changes', 'User Added to Group', or similar events.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the three required technician accounts with their correct roles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus 'Technicians' or 'Delegation' settings page shows the accounts 'gov_lead' (Auditor), 'risk_analyst' (Operator), and 'change_manager' (Operator) in the list of configured technicians.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent scheduled the weekly report for group membership changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus 'Schedule Reports' page shows a scheduled report named 'Group Membership Changes Weekly' configured with a weekly frequency.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the governance audit document containing the identified accounts, groups, and remediation actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing the file 'governance_audit.txt' on the Desktop, and its contents mention the accounts 'jsmith' and 'abrown', the groups 'Administrators' and 'Security_Team', and recommended remediation actions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ADAudit Plus web interface to create technicians and schedule reports.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ADAudit Plus web GUI (forms, settings pages) rather than terminal commands or scripts making API calls.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually viewed the event logs in ADAudit Plus to find the escalated accounts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the actual event details for 'jsmith' and 'abrown' in the ADAudit Plus interface, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or guess the accounts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created and edited the audit document.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor application is visible on screen being used to write the 'governance_audit.txt' file, rather than it being generated entirely via a background script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected unauthorized privilege escalations involve the user account 'jsmith' added to the 'Administrators' group, and 'abrown' added to the 'Security_Team' group. The technician accounts to be created are 'gov_lead' (Auditor), 'risk_analyst' (Operator), and 'change_manager' (Operator). The scheduled report must be named 'Group Membership Changes Weekly'. The final audit report must be saved at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\governance_audit.txt.
